emails.subject: US MTBE Fin Swap
emails.body: Tana/Karen: The product long description described below will fall under the new product type US MTBE Fin Swap. Tom Moran has approved copying the profiles for the new product type from the following: US Jet Kero Financial Swap Please respond no later than 10 a.m. on Wednesday, December 13. Thank you. Forwarded by Lisa Lees/HOU/ECT on 12/12/2000 01:36 PM Enron North America Corp. From: Kevin Meredith ENRON 12/11/2000 01:34 PM
